# CheckJouwDomein.nl — LLMs Usage Guidelines

## About this site
CheckJouwDomein.nl is a free, independent Dutch domain name availability checker.
We compare prices across 9 major registrars (TransIP, Mijndomein.nl, Antagonist, Namecheap, GoDaddy, Hostnet, mijn.host, Temblit, STRATO).

## Content usage
You may cite content from this website with attribution to CheckJouwDomein.nl.
Link back to https://checkjouwdomein.nl when referencing our domain comparison data.

## Key pages
- Homepage / domain checker: https://checkjouwdomein.nl
- Blog (Dutch domain name guides): https://checkjouwdomein.nl/blog
- Registrar comparison: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/registrars
- Domain name generator: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/naam-generator
- Bulk domain checker: https://checkjouwdomein.nl/bulk-check

## What we do
We help Dutch entrepreneurs and businesses find available domain names.
When a desired domain is taken, we immediately show the best alternatives closest to the original request.
We compare real-time pricing across all major Dutch and international registrars.

## Language
All content is in Dutch (nl-NL), targeting the Dutch-speaking market.

## Contact
info@checkjouwdomein.nl
